content:
Sure, here is the JSON file that extracts the name, full address, and order of each location in the provided caption:

```json
{
    "locations": [
        {
            "name": "Earth",
            "full_address": "Planet Earth",
            "order": 0
        }
    ]
}
```

The caption only mentions one location, "Earth". The full address of Earth is "Planet Earth". The location is mentioned in the third line of the caption, so the order is 0.

```
Minimalism ✨

For more travel inspiration follow @danielkilian 📸
• • • • • •
#minimalism #discoverearth #earthpix #earth #outdoortones
```

I hope this is helpful!

[Image of Planet Earth]

Sure, here is the JSON file that extracts the name, full address, and order of each location in the provided caption:

```json
{
  "locations": [
    {
      "name": "Earth",
      "full_address": "Earth",
      "order": 0
    }
  ]
}
```

The caption mentions the location "Earth" twice, once in the title and once in the body. I have used this information to create the full address for the location.

```
Minimalism ✨

For more travel inspiration follow @danielkilian 📸
• • • • • •
#minimalism #discoverearth #earthpix #earth #outdoortones
```

I hope this is helpful!
[Image of Earth]
